bugs.desc: Page content overflows horizontally at 768px viewport width. Causes horizontal scrolling on mobile.

bugs.title: 1 Broken Image(s)
bugs.desc: 1 image(s) failed to load, degrading page appearance and user experience.
bugs.steps:
1. Navigate to: https://uat.opsmonsters.com/blogs/architecture-in-the-digital-way
2. Observe broken image icons
3. Open DevTools (F12) > Network > Filter: Img
4. Check for 404 responses

bugs.title: JavaScript Errors in Console (1)
bugs.desc: 1 JS error(s) found. May indicate broken functionality.
bugs.steps:
1. Navigate to: https://uat.opsmonsters.com/blogs/architecture-in-the-digital-way
2. Open DevTools (F12)
3. Click Console tab
4. Reload page

bugs.title: Slow Page Load (4.00s)
bugs.desc: Page took 4.00s to load. Recommended threshold is 3s.
bugs.steps:
1. Navigate to: https://uat.opsmonsters.com/blogs/architecture-in-the-digital-way
2. DevTools > Network > Check total load time

bugs.title: 1 Form Input(s) Missing Labels
bugs.desc: 1 form input(s) have no associated label. Breaks accessibility for screen reader users.
bugs.steps:
1. Navigate to: https://uat.opsmonsters.com/blogs/architecture-in-the-digital-way
2. Locate form inputs
3. Check each input for <label for=''> or aria-label
bugs.expected: All inputs have visible labels or aria-label

bugs.title: Multiple Missing Security Headers (6)
bugs.desc: Missing critical security headers expose the site to attacks (XSS, clickjacking, MIME sniffing).
bugs.steps:
1. DevTools > Network > select page request > Headers tab
2. Check for security headers
bugs.expected: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS, CSP all present
bugs.actual:
Missing: x-frame-options
x-content-type-options
strict-transport-security
content-security-policy
referrer-policy
permissions-policy

bugs.steps:

2. Toggle device toolbar
3. Set width to 768px
4. Observe horizontal scroll

1. Navigate to: https://uat.opsmonsters.com/terms-and-conditions
2. DevTools > Network > Check total load time

allBugs.title: 1 Form Input(s) Missing Labels
allBugs.desc: 1 form input(s) have no associated label. Breaks accessibility for screen reader users.
allBugs.steps:
1. Navigate to: https://uat.opsmonsters.com/terms-and-conditions
2. Locate form inputs
3. Check each input for <label for=''> or aria-label
allBugs.expected: All inputs have visible labels or aria-label

allBugs.title: Multiple Missing Security Headers (6)
allBugs.desc: Missing critical security headers expose the site to attacks (XSS, clickjacking, MIME sniffing).
allBugs.steps:
1. DevTools > Network > select page request > Headers tab
2. Check for security headers
allBugs.expected: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS, CSP all present
allBugs.actual:
Missing: x-frame-options
x-content-type-options
strict-transport-security
content-security-policy
referrer-policy
permissions-policy

allBugs.title: JavaScript Errors in Console (1)
allBugs.desc: 1 JS error(s) found. May indicate broken functionality.
allBugs.steps:
1. Navigate to: https://uat.opsmonsters.com/privacy-policy
2. Open DevTools (F12)
3. Click Console tab
4. Reload page

allBugs.title: Horizontal Overflow on Tablet (iPad)
allBugs.desc: Page content overflows horizontally at 768px viewport width. Causes horizontal scrolling on mobile.

1. Open DevTools (F12)
2. Toggle device toolbar
3. Set width to 768px
4. Observe horizontal scroll
